response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior engineer (~14 years) but has minimal C++ experience — only a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. The role requires deep C++/STL expertise, multi-threaded systems, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity, none of which appear in the resume. Primary stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, which doesn't transfer cleanly to a C++-centric industrial automation role.
strengths: Strong overall engineering tenure with senior/staff-level roles
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Sociomantic
Solid background in testing, TDD, and mentoring/workshops
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, over a decade ago
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, or SDL background
No experience with MQTT, message brokers, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
